scripts.test: pnpm run test:build && pnpm run test:run
scripts.test:run: node .test-dist/tests/downloads.unit.test.js && node .test-dist/tests/downloads.integration.test.js && node .test-dist/tests/map-demand-stats.unit.test.js && node .test-dist/tests/map-demand-stats.integration.test.js && node .test-dist/tests/discord-webhook.unit.test.js && node .test-dist/tests/map-field-utils.test.js && node .test-dist/tests/update-map-template.integration.test.js && node .test-dist/tests/update-map-listing.integration.test.js && node .test-dist/tests/validation-rules.integration.test.js
scripts.generate-downloads: pnpm run generate-downloads:maps && pnpm run generate-downloads:mods
